title: 2013 Census publications | Stats NZ
content:
## 2013 Census publications
Data, reports, and information about methods used for the 2013 Census.
- Information releases

## 2013 Census news stories

## 2013 Census counted over 97 percent of population
The 2013 Census counted 97.6 percent of the population, Statistics New Zealand said today.

## Auckland fastest-growing region since last census, and South Island districts grow most
AucklandвЂ™s population grew by over 110,000 people since the 2006 Census, while Selwyn, Queenstown-Lakes, and Waimakariri were the fastest-growing districts in the country, Statistics New Zealand said today.

## 2013 Census information releases

## 2013 Census meshblock dataset
Contains countsВ at meshblock and other geographic levelsВ for selected variables from the 2013, 2006, and 2001 Censuses.В TheВ geographies correspond to 2013 Census boundaries. The counts are at the highest level of each variableвЂ™s classification.

## 2013 Census population and dwelling tables
Census population and dwelling tables provide counts of people and dwellings by regional council area, territorial authority area, Auckland local board area, and area unit.

## 2013 Census usually resident population counts
Census usually resident population counts are a count of everyone who usually lives in New Zealand, or in a particular area, and is present in New Zealand on census night.

## 2013 Census infographics

## People aged 65+ living in New Zealand
This infographic presents key facts about older people (aged 65+) living in New Zealand in 2013.

## Education and training in New Zealand
This infographic presents key facts about the education and training of people in New Zealand in 2013.

## Transport and communications in New Zealand
This infographic presents key facts about transport and communications in New Zealand in 2013.

## Major ethnic groups in New Zealand
This infographic presents key characteristics of the major ethnic groups in New Zealand in 2013.

## Families and households in New Zealand
This infographic presents key characteristics of families and households in New Zealand in 2013.

## 2013 Census individual iwi posters
These posters about New Zealand's 74 largest individualВ iwi show 2013 Census information in English and te reo MДЃori.

## 2013 Census вЂ“ Spotlight on greater Christchurch
This infographic highlights some of the key changes in greater Christchurch since the 2006 Census.

## New Zealand as a village of 100 people
This infographic presents an overview of New Zealand's population in 2013.

## 2013 Census QuickStats about a place
Find out how to get 2013 Census statistics by place.

## 2013 Census ethnic group profiles
Find statistics from the 2013 Census about the different ethnic groups living in New Zealand.

## 2013 Census iwi profiles
Find statistics from the 2013 Census about iwi and iwi groupings.

## Living outside the norm: An analysis of people living in temporary and communal dwellings, 2013 Census
Provides information about people in New Zealand at the time of the 2013 Census who lived in dwellings considered to be outside the norm.

## 2013 Census QuickStats about people aged 65 and over
Information about a variety of topics relating to the 65 and over age group in New Zealand.

## 2013 Census QuickStats about education and training
Information about topics relating to education and training in New Zealand, at both national and subnational levels.

## 2013 Census QuickStats about work and unpaid activities
2013 Census information about topics relating to work and unpaid activities in New Zealand, at both national and subnational levels.

## 2013 Census QuickStats about transport and communications
2013 Census information about topics relating to transport and communications in New Zealand, at both national and subnational levels.

## 2013 Census QuickStats about families and households
Provides information about a variety of topics relating to families and households in New Zealand, at both a national and subnational level.

## 2013 Census QuickStats about income
2013 Census information about topics related to income. Find out about sources and amounts of personal income, family income, household income.

## 2013 Census iwi individual profiles
Provides an overview of those people who stated they were of MДЃori descent and belonged to one or more iwi in the 2013 Census. Get information on topics such as age and sex, language, religion, and housing.

## 2013 Census iwi grouping profiles
Provides an overview of those people who stated they were of MДЃori descent in the 2013 Census, and who fit into a larger grouping of iwi. Get information on topics such as age and sex, language, religion, and housing.

## 2013 Census QuickStats about greater Christchurch
Outlines the situation in greater Christchurch two years after the 2010вЂ“11 earthquakes.

## 2013 Census QuickStats about culture and identity
2013 Census information about New Zealand's increasingly diverse population. Find out more about ethnic groups in New Zealand, birthplace and people born overseas, languages spoken, religious affiliation.

## 2013 Census QuickStats about housing
Information about a variety of topics related to housing in New Zealand, at both a national and regional level.

## 2013 Census QuickStats about MДЃori
Information about MДЃori people living in New Zealand, and how life has changed for this ethnic group since 2006.

## 2013 Census QuickStats about national highlights
Information about demographic, social, and economic subjects at a national level.

## 2013 Census collection methods
Explains the collections process and the challenges faced when trying to count everyone in New Zealand in the 2013 Census.

## 2013 Census mail-out district: A census data collection pilot
Outlines the processes we used to run the mail-out district pilot during the 2013 Census, the key lessons we learned from it, and recommendations for the next census.

## Online response in the 2013 Census: Respondent behaviours and characteristics
Presents the results of research carried out by Statistics NZ into two aspects of online response in the 2013 Census.

## 2013 Census data user guide
This guide answers some of the common questions about the collection, processing, interpretation, and use of 2013 Census data.

## 2013 Census definitions and forms
Provides definitions of terminology used in outputs from the 2013 Census of Population and Dwellings. It is part of a reference series for census data users that provides information about the data produced.

## The mathematics of electorate allocation in New Zealand based on the outcome of the 2013 Census and MДЃori Electoral Option 2013
Describes how the number of electorates in New Zealand is calculated, as specified in the Electoral Act 1993.

## 2011 Census form design report
Describes the improvements that have been made to the 2011 Census forms.

## 2013 Census research

## Comparing labour force variables from 2013 Census and administrative data
Explores the potential for administrative data to provide information for the two main labour market measures in the census: work and labour force status and status in employment.

## Comparing 2013 Census and admin data for number of children born
Presents our investigation into the potential for deriving information on the number of children born from admin data.
